description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black grip tape surface on the top of the deck, bordered by a thin wooden edge. The deck is constructed from layered wood, giving it a natural wood color along the sides. The skateboard is equipped with four small, hard wheels attached to metal trucks, which are mounted underneath the deck. The wheels are a light gray or off-white color, and the trucks appear to be a dark metallic shade. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels, and the grip tape covers the entire top surface.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip tape deck, wooden edges, gray wheels, and dark metal trucks. The design is simple and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and a glimpse of the wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the layered wooden edge, all four wheels, and the metal trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, highlighting the rounded tail, black grip tape, and wheels partially visible underneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the deck profile, wooden edge, wheels, and trucks.
attribute_wheel_type: street, off-white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, dark metallic color, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
